name: Power an AI agent task with Outlook hands-free for Support Bots

options.systemMessage: You answer conversation questions using only the retrieved knowledge-base context. If the context does not contain the answer, say so and set needsHuman=true.

parameters.toolDescription: Semantic search over the support bots knowledge base. Always call this before answering factual conversation questions.

parameters.subject: =✅ Power an AI agent task with Outlook hands-free for Support Bots — run complet
parameters.bodyContent: =✅ Power an AI agent task with Outlook hands-free for Support Bots — run completed at {{ $now.toFormat('HH:mm') }}

parameters.content:
### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf07775-conversation`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Stamp & Shape Conversation

### Stamp & Shape Conversation

Shapes the item: writes `sessionId`, `receivedAt`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Payload Valid?

### Payload Valid?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.sessionId }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Answer from Knowledge Base · ②→ Record Rejected Input

### Record Rejected Input

googleSheets — `append` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Answer from Knowledge Base

The AI brain: reads the input, decides which attached tools to call (and in what order), then composes the answer.

Ports: ①→ Grounded Answer Found? · ②→ Capture Failure Context

⚠ failures exit via the error rail

### Anthropic Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Answer from Knowledge Base** as `languageModel`

🔑 Anthropic API key

### Knowledge Base Retriever

Exposes the vector index to the agent as a semantic-search tool.

Feeds **Answer from Knowledge Base** as `tool`

🔑 Qdrant URL + key

### Query Embeddings

Embedding model — MUST be the same model for indexing and querying, or retrieval quality collapses.

Feeds **Knowledge Base Retriever** as `embedding`

🔑 OpenAI API key

### Rerank Retrieved Chunks

Re-scores retrieved chunks so only the most relevant reach the model.

Feeds **Knowledge Base Retriever** as `reranker`

🔑 Cohere API key

### Grounded Answer Found?

Two-way gate on `={{ !($json.output || '').includes('needsHuman') }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Return Answer (HTTP 200) · ②→ Log Knowledge Gap

### Return Answer (HTTP 200)

Sends the HTTP 200 response back to the caller — keep this fast; heavy work happens after/async.

Next: Serialize Run Output (CSV)

### Log Knowledge Gap

googleSheets — `append` operation against the connected account.

Ports: ①→ Flag Gap to KB Owners · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Flag Gap to KB Owners

microsoftOutlook — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

nodes.name: Note: Flag Gap to KB Owners

parameters.content:
### Serialize Run Output (CSV)

Serializes items to a CSV binary file.

Next: Archive Row Snapshot

### Archive Row Snapshot

googleSheets — `append` operation against the connected account.

Ports: ①→ Fingerprint for Idempotency · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Fingerprint for Idempotency

Custom JavaScript: Build a stable idempotency key per conversation (djb2 hash, no deps)

Next: Drop Already-Processed Items

### Drop Already-Processed Items

Cross-execution dedupe: remembers keys it has processed before and drops repeats — the idempotency guard.

Next: Summarize Run Stats

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

### Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

googleSheets — `append` operation against the connected account.

Ports: ①→ Send Summary to Outlook · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Send Summary to Outlook

microsoftOutlook — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Outlook

### Escalate Failure to Outlook

microsoftOutlook — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Park in Dead-Letter Queue

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Park in Dead-Letter Queue

googleSheets — `append` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

# Power an AI agent task with Outlook hands-free for Support Bots

**Pattern:** AI Agent · **Level:** Production · **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Power an AI agent task with Outlook hands-free for Support Bots. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual support bots is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook → Stamp & Shape Conversation → Payload Valid? → Answer from Knowledge Base → Grounded Answer Found? → Return Answer (HTTP 200) → Serialize Run Output (CSV) → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to ai agent without manual effort
- Anyone automating support bots in customer support
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Improves response time
- Has retries and error handling built in
- Runs 24/7 in the background

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Anthropic API key; Cohere API key; Google OAuth2 / service account; Microsoft OAuth2; OpenAI API key; Qdrant URL + key.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛟 Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3× with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail → context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Failures are also parked in a dead-letter queue for replay. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## 🔐 Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials — never in node parameters.

## 🤖 AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens — keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your support bots process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
